note: active on-disk size, compressed; T2 (STOCKHOUSE_T2_RUN8 streaming, interactive raw QUOTES_IT + interactive MV QUOTES_DAILY_IMV). Snowflake bytes/rows from SHOW (metadata-only) since an interactive MV does not surface in TABLE_STORAGE_METRICS: QUOTES_IT from SHOW TABLES, QUOTES_DAILY_IMV from SHOW MATERIALIZED VIEWS (behind_by 0s, refreshed 2026-07-21T16:11:07-07:00); MV rows are logical (sym,day) groups. ClickHouse bytes/rows are reused from the T1 run (same ~113B-row co-scaled dataset): raw from system.parts sum(bytes_on_disk)/sum(rows) on QUOTES, MV on QUOTES_DAILY.
